languages.text: "Мне надоел этот бой не меньше. Но если ты не отступишься..."
"I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."
languages.original_text: "Мне надоел этот бой не меньше. Но если ты не отступишься..."

traits.locale_text: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."
"I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."
"I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."

languages.text: «Estoy tan {mf|harto|harta} de esta batalla como tú. Pero si te niegas a retirarte...».
languages.original_text: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy tan {mf|harto|harta} de esta batalla como tú. Pero si te niegas a retirarte...».

languages.text: “我跟你一样厌倦这场战斗。但如果你不撤退的话……”
languages.original_text: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."

traits.locale_text: “我跟你一样厌倦这场战斗。但如果你不撤退的话……”

languages.text: « Je suis tout aussi {mf|las|lasse} de ce combat que vous, mais si vous ne battez pas en retraite... »
languages.original_text: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis tout aussi {mf|las|lasse} de ce combat que vous, mais si vous ne battez pas en retraite... »

languages.text: "Bu savaştan en az senin kadar yoruldum. Fakat geri çekilmezsen..."
languages.original_text: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."

traits.locale_text: "Bu savaştan en az senin kadar yoruldum. Fakat geri çekilmezsen..."

languages.text: "Ich habe diesen Kampf genauso satt wie Ihr. Aber wenn Ihr nicht aufgebt ..."
languages.original_text: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe diesen Kampf genauso satt wie Ihr. Aber wenn Ihr nicht aufgebt ..."

languages.text: 「この戦いは私にとってもあなたと同じく疲れます。でも、あなたが撤退しなければ…」
languages.original_text: "I am no less tired of this battle than you. But if you do not retreat..."

traits.locale_text: 「この戦いは私にとってもあなたと同じく疲れます。でも、あなたが撤退しなければ…」
